headline: GraphQL Schema Design
description: GraphQL schema design defines types, queries, mutations, and relationships. Best practices: design around business domain (not database schema), use Relay-style pagination (edges/nodes), avoid deeply nested queries (N+1 solved by DataLoader), version via evolution (add fields, deprecate old ones — never remove).
